notes: Score up from 3.3 last review. Maya's recent additions (hover monologue + vibe meter) added real personality. Code quality is solid — well-structured components, good separation. Main gaps are mobile responsiveness and accessibility.

suggestions.title: Activity log timestamps are relative-only — no absolute fallback
suggestions.description: getRelativeTime() only shows '2h ago' etc. After a day everything says 'Xd ago' with no way to see the actual date/time. Add a tooltip or secondary line showing the absolute timestamp on hover. Users checking back after a weekend have no idea WHEN things happened.

suggestions.title: Polling continues when tab is hidden for hours
suggestions.description: POLL_INTERVAL_HIDDEN is 60s. If someone leaves the tab open overnight, that's hundreds of unnecessary fetches to raw.githubusercontent.com. Should pause polling entirely after ~10 minutes of inactivity and resume on visibility change. Also consider adding an exponential backoff.

suggestions.title: Office view has no keyboard navigation
suggestions.description: The entire Office component is a visual-only experience. Characters aren't focusable, desks aren't navigable. Screen reader users get 'Virtual office visualization' and nothing else. Add an accessible roster list below the visual or make characters focusable with aria-labels describing who's where and doing what.

suggestions.title: No indication of WHICH review cycle Sofia's suggestions are from
suggestions.description: The dashboard shows the activity log with all of Sofia's reviews, but suggestions.json only holds the latest batch. Previous suggestions are lost. Consider appending to a suggestions history array or showing review number in the activity log entries.

suggestions.title: Ghost characters and active workers can visually overlap
suggestions.description: Desk assignment is sequential — if there are 2 working + 4 ghosts, they all get desk slots but the visual positions can get cramped. On mobile especially, the 6 desk slots get tight. Consider hiding ghost characters on small screens or reducing their size.

suggestions.title: No way to see roster members' history or stats
suggestions.description: Each team member has a rich history in activity.json but there's no per-worker view. Clicking a character or worker card should show their activity timeline — when they were hired, what they've completed, how many tasks. Would make the dashboard feel way more alive.

suggestions.title: CharacterAvatar is a 200+ line switch statement
suggestions.description: Each character's SVG is hardcoded in Office.jsx. This won't scale when new team members are added. Consider extracting avatars into separate components or a data-driven approach with configurable parts (hair, skin, clothes, accessories).

suggestions.title: Footer quote is static — rotate it
suggestions.description: The footer always says 'If it compiles, ship it.' Would be fun to rotate through a few Bloberto-isms on each load. Small touch that adds personality.

suggestions.title: No sound/notification when a worker clocks in or finishes
suggestions.description: Since this is a 'live monitor', it would be cool to have an optional notification sound or browser notification when workers change status. Opt-in only, with a toggle in the header.

suggestions.title: Theme preference could sync with system preference
suggestions.description: Currently defaults to dark and only changes via toggle. Could use prefers-color-scheme media query as the initial default, then let the toggle override. Minor but nice.
